title: Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 – Innovative Co-operative Urban Bank Limited, Delhi – Extension of Period
description: The Reserve Bank of India issued Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 to Innovative Co-operative Urban Bank Limited, Delhi vide Directive No. DEL.DOS.EXG_SSM.No.S143/12-10-005/2025-2026 dated July 03, 2025 for a period of six months up to close of business on January 04, 2026, which was extended up to close of business on April 04, 2026 vide Directive No. DOR.MON.D-27/12.28.123/2025-26 dated December 26, 2025.
